sentences.translation: Konobar je pitao gosta što želi.
sentences.translationEn: The waiter asked the customer what he wanted.

sentences.translation: Rekao je da voli laganu hranu.
sentences.translationEn: He said he likes light food.

sentences.translation: Konobar je preporučio tanjir supe i hljeba.
sentences.translationEn: The waiter recommended a plate of soup and bread.

sentences.translation: Gost je prihvatio i čekao svoju hranu.
sentences.translationEn: The customer accepted and waited for his food.
